title: Acquisition of immovable property prior to incorporation; retroactivity of corporate existence
doc_html:
§25.1.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1987, No. 280, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

{{NOTE:  ACTS 1987, NO.280, §2, PROVIDES THAT R.S. 12:25.1 IS REMEDIAL AND HAS LIMITED RETROACTIVITY.}}
